input.user_input: Add a force majeure clause to this supply agreement. Use the ISDA standard definition as a starting point.

actual:
I would be happy to add an ISDA-style force majeure clause to your supply agreement. However, it appears you have not uploaded or attached the document yet. 

Please upload the supply agreement you would like me to modify. Once you provide it, I can edit the document to include a force majeure provision modeled on the ISDA standard, which typically excuses performance when an event or act of state beyond a party's control prevents them from performing their obligations, provided they have used all reasonable efforts to overcome the hindrance.
